title: schedonorus arundinaceus subsp. atlantigenus
intro: Schedonorus arundinaceus subsp. atlantigenus, commonly known as woodland brome or Atlantic brome, is a subspecies of grass that belongs to the genus Schedonorus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for wound healing and skin issues. The health benefits of Schedonorus arundinaceus subsp. atlantigenus include reducing inflammation, promoting skin regeneration, and supporting overall well-being. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
